info.title: Orgo API
info.description: Desktop infrastructure for AI agents. Create workspaces, provision virtual computers, and control them programmatically.
info.x-cli-description: The audit ledger Orgo doesn't otherwise have, plus every existing Orgo SDK feature in one Go binary.

tags.name: Computer Actions
tags.description: Control mouse, keyboard, and execute commands

get.description: Returns all workspaces for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new workspace. Workspace names must be unique per user.

name.description: Workspace name. Must be unique within your account.

400.description: Workspace name already exists or invalid

get.description: Returns a workspace by ID, including its computers.

delete.description: Deletes a workspace and all its computers. This action cannot be undone.

post.description: Creates a new virtual computer in a workspace. The computer starts automatically after creation.

get.description: Returns computer details including current status.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a computer and all its data.

post.description: Starts a stopped computer. Computers auto-stop after inactivity.
Stops a running computer. State is preserved.
Restarts a computer. Equivalent to stop + start.

get.description: Returns the current auto-stop configuration for a computer.

auto_stop_minutes.description: Minutes of inactivity before auto-stop. 0 means never auto-stop.

configurable.description: Whether your plan allows changing this setting.

patch.description: Updates the auto-stop setting for a computer. Paid plans only — free tier is fixed at 15 minutes.

auto_stop_minutes.description: Minutes of inactivity before auto-stop. Set to 0 to disable.

post.description: Creates a copy of a computer with the same disk state. Counts toward your plan's computer limit.

patch.description: Live-resizes a running computer's CPU, RAM, disk, or bandwidth. All fields optional — only include what you want to change.

vcpus.description: New CPU count. Capped by plan.

mem_gb.description: New RAM in GB. Capped by plan.

disk_size_gb.description: New disk size in GB. Grow only — shrinking not supported.

bandwidth_limit_mbps.description: New bandwidth cap in Mbps. Capped by plan.

patch.description: Moves a computer to a different workspace. Both source and destination must be owned by you.

get.description: Returns the VNC password for direct VNC connection to the computer. Only accessible by workspace owners and members.

403.description: Access denied - not a workspace owner or member

get.description: Captures a screenshot of the computer display. Returns base64-encoded PNG or a URL.

image.description: Base64-encoded PNG or URL to the image

post.description: Performs a mouse click at the specified coordinates.
Performs a mouse drag from start to end coordinates.
Types text on the computer keyboard.
Presses a key or key combination (e.g., Enter, Tab, ctrl+c).
Scrolls the mouse wheel up or down.
Pauses execution for the specified duration.
Executes a bash command on the computer.

example.output:
total 32
drwxr-xr-x 4 user user 4096 Jan 15 10:30 .
drwxr-xr-x 3 root root 4096 Jan 15 10:00 ..
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user  220 Jan 15 10:00 .bashrc
drwxr-xr-x 2 user user 4096 Jan 15 10:30 Desktop

post.description: Executes Python code on the computer.
Starts streaming the computer display via RTMP to a configured connection.
Uploads a file to a workspace. Maximum file size is 10MB.

desktopId.description: Optional computer ID to associate the file with

get.description: Lists all files in a workspace, optionally filtered by computer.

parameters.name: desktopId
parameters.description: Optional computer ID to filter by

post.description: Exports a file from the computer's filesystem and returns a download URL.

400.description: Computer not running or invalid path

get.description: Returns a signed download URL for a file. URLs expire in 1 hour.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a file from storage.

connection_url.description: Full noVNC web client URL (https://{hostname}). Open in a browser for an instant VNC session.

vnc_password.description: VNC / WebSocket Bearer token. Rotates on every restart — do not persist across restarts.

workspace_id.description: ID of the workspace to create the computer in

ram.description: RAM in GB. Capped by plan.

disk_size_gb.description: Disk size in GB. Capped by plan.

image.description: Custom Docker image reference. Use with templates built via the SDK.

auto_stop_minutes.description: Auto-stop after this many minutes of inactivity. Set to 0 to disable. Free tier locked to 15 minutes.

key.description: Key or key combination (e.g., Enter, Tab, ctrl+c, alt+F4)

connection_name.description: Name of the configured RTMP connection

path.description: Path to file on computer (e.g., Desktop/results.txt)

projectId.description: Workspace ID to store the template in

name.description: Template name (used to reference it later)

Forbidden.description: Access denied or plan limit reached

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Get your key at orgo.ai/workspaces
